title: Argentinian Stir Fried Rice
description: Quick and flavorful stir-fried rice dish inspired by the flavors of Argentina.
instructions: Heat 1 tbsp of buttery in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add chopped onion and minced garlic. Stir-fry until the onion is translucent.
Add sliced stir-fry vegetables and cook until they start to soften.
Add cooked Argentinian rice to the skillet, breaking up any clumps with a spatula.
Stir-fry the rice mixture for 2-3 minutes, until the rice is heated through and starting to brown.
Season with argentinian spices to taste.
Transfer the stir-fry to a serving platter and garnish with chopped fresh herbs, if desired.
